title: solidago velutina subsp. californica
intro: Solidago velutina subsp. californica, also known as California fleabane or Californian goldenrod, is a perennial plant in the aster family native to California. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection in wounds. The plant is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to protect against oxidative stress and promote immune system function. Solidago velutina subsp. californica is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and may also be found in topical creams and salves to support skin health and reduce inflammation.
